methods.description: Process for collecting soil samples from various depths and preparing them for sporomorph concentration analysis using standard laboratory procedures.

steps.description: Samples, with a volume of 1 cm³, were taken from the 5 cm² surface of the soil and from depths of 1-2 cm and 5-6 cm of the soil profile.
steps.searchable_summary: collect soil samples from specified depths

steps.description: Samples were prepared using standard laboratory procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare soil samples using standard lab procedures

steps.description: Tablets containing indicator (Lycopodium spores) were added to calculate the sporomorphs concentration.
steps.searchable_summary: add Lycopodium spores to samples for concentration calculation

methods.description: Procedure for calculating sporomorph concentration and presenting results using the POLPAL pollen diagram convention.

steps.description: Sporomorphs have been calculated on the surface of a single microscope slide (24x24mm).
Results are graphically presented in the POLPAL pollen diagram convention.
steps.searchable_summary: present results using POLPAL pollen diagram

methods.description: Calculation of Pollen Accumulation Rate (PAR) for selected taxa from soil surface samples and Tauber-type traps.

steps.description: Pollen Accumulation Rate (PAR) was counted for selected taxa from soil surface samples and for Tauber-type traps.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Pollen Accumulation Rate for selected taxa
